purpose: Date-stamped manual web evidence for official CEIP strategy source anchors that were reachable through Exa/browser verification but unreachable, blocked, or not reliably text-matchable through the local automated Node fetch in this workspace.
limitations: This file records term-level source verification only. It does not replace live source review, buyer evidence, legal review, or production approval.
